review_title: Very efficient and accurate time tracker platform!
author: Lorain R.
pros: We needed an efficient way to track employee hours and attendance, and this solution was the perfect fit. With its cloud-based system, it's easy to access from anywhere and it's fully automated - so no more manual time sheets. The customer service team was great too - they answered all our questions and got us up and running in no time. We're very happy with PayClock Online!
cons: Don't have negative to say at the moment, works perfectly fine for me!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I would recommend this product but facial recognition did not always work but is not necessary to it being a good product.
author: Kim C.
pros: I liked PayClock Online because their customer service was great, it is easy to use, and the reports are great and can be edited if needed.
cons: When website goes down it dos not work and can obviously cause problems. Does not happen often but still an issue.

description: They have the right idea but don't have enough resources to keep the software a smooth running machine. Customers will take reliability over bells and whistles with software. Supposedly they have been in business for 100 years but they won't be much longer if these crashing issues are persistent in the future.
author: Brandon D.
pros: When it's working, the website and software is fairly intuitive and has decent reports that I use for payroll. They have a mobile app available which comes in handy for our truckers who are always on the road and don't have the option to punch in at a physical Payclock terminal.
cons: The past 2 payroll periods have been in jeopardy of being delayed because Payclock Online was down, and their website crashed. The most recent incident where the site was down, it took a day and a half to get back up and running.

description: Excellent program and worth every penny.
author: Temple B.
pros: Simple and Easy and progressive for time

description: Overall, it does everything it needs to. MOST everything is straight-forward and simply. There are a few things I wish they would make more clear, simple, less "manual," and less clunky. But, as far as the other options out there, it works and does what it needs to do. It's a bit pricey, but having the option of employees being able to request time off, view their hours, view and manage their vacation/PTO time, etc. adds a lot of benefit.
author: Jaqlyn M.
pros: Most of the features are intuitive. It integrates with QBO (it's clunky on QB's end, but that is due to issues with QBO). It does a really great job keeping track of PTO/vacation time (much better than QuickBooks). The ability for employees to track their hours, vacation time, etc. and make requests through the app is excellent. Their recent update to the app was a huge improvement as well.
cons: There are some features that could be less manual, and there are some features that could be more intuitive and less clunky. Even with the assistance of customer service, we have yet to figure out how to work the lunches into the scheduling correctly (we just monitor this manually).

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The platform is very flexible, either desktop or mobile app is very easy to install, maintain and use.
cons: The Quickbooks integration can be difficult if you have multiple Quickbooks companies.

review_title: Very good experience using this product. Has simplified my time keeping tasks.
author: Michael F.
pros: I really enjoy the ability to access time records in the cloud and from various locations. It's also simple to sync the software with the time clock and make updates as needed.
cons: None that reach top of mind. I this is a great product and an excellent value. This is tremendous improvement from the time clock software I was using previously.

description: It has made our lives here easier by allowing us to get work done from any computer at any time and allowing employees multiple ways to clock in from work.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It makes it easier for us to track our staff hours and offers us a lot of ways to clock in, via phone, online or using our time clock. Employees can clock in with ease and our HR department can log in to keep things straight at any time from any computer.
cons: The time clock still has to stay connected to one computer to work and when that disconnects everything gets messed up. I am not sure this is a software problem though.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: PayClock offers an impressive software and hardware solution for employees and managers.
description: Online access to data for management and employees. Automated tracking of clock in/out. Employees can access PTO info from mobile devices.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's a cloud based solution with well designed screens. Numerous configuration options are available. It's easy for employees to log it using the mobile app and check their time logs and PTO.
cons: First-time set up is very time consuming but that is the nature of the beast. You cannot schedule reports to run automatically.

author: Paula M.
pros: The screens are clean and crisp and very easy to read.
cons: Nothing.... I love the software. It is simple to use and all of the reports are at your fingertips.

description: I've been using it for years and really appreciate not having to enter hours myself.
author: Loene G.
pros: efficient, hardly ever have a problem with it and when I do the tech team quickly fixes it, makes bookkeeping and payroll easy
cons: whenever I have a change in employees, I have to call the tech department to make QuickBooks and PayClock update and meld.

description: My overall experience has been great! Easy to use has made processing payroll a breeze.
author: Jennifer C.
pros: I like the ease of use as the administrator. It is very easy to navigate and make any adjustments that may be needed.
cons: Sometimes my employees complain about the app not working. They usually have to delete the app and reinstall and it takes care of the problem.

author: Kevin W.
pros: Easy access form anywhere, easy to use, cloud based.
cons: When I first went to payclock online there were a few times it was unavailable due to some Microsoft issues. This was back a few years ago and hasn't happened since. The only complaint I might have now is that it is slow sometimes.

description: Overall the payclock software works well. We have had a few problems but those were resolved within a reasonable period of time once I contacted customer service.
author: Elizabeth S.
pros: Ease of operation. Pricing is acceptable.
cons: Occasional problem with connectivity. Not sure how I can connect this to my Quickbooks software.

author: Chad W.
pros: The product works great. My employees can clock in easily with a card when the work at the office. They can also use the app when they work remote.
cons: The software works as expected. I don't really have any complaints.

description: I love the customer service. Every time I call they are very helpful and help me find a solution to all my problems.
author: Jamie D.
pros: Easy to use and customer service is amazing
cons: That I probably don’t know all the amazing features that it offers,.

description: I have found Pay Clock online to be very effective. We have 3 office locations and it works very well for keeping up with all 3 offices.
author: Lisa H.
pros: It has made doing payroll for 3 different locations much easier
cons: None

description: my overall experience has been positive
author: Joey R.
pros: looks after all our time clock needs we just upgraded to cloud
cons: There is nothing so far about this software i don't like no cons

author: Teena F.
pros: We have three stores and this app enables everyone to clock in remotely.
cons: Unable to get call back from support. A product is only as good as the support we receive, so far I can't say we have received that. Two support calls never answered.

author: michael M.
pros: Having employees use the app to clock in and clock out is so helpful to my daily operations.
cons: Really do not have anything I don't like about the software.

description: I've been very pleased with our PayClock Online. It's accurate, easy to use, and comes with great customer service.
author: Tracey N.
pros: I can access it from anywhere
cons: Some reports don't work

description: Online has given me so many features and conveniences that make my day-to-day job easier! I would recommend this program to people with 10 employees to 100 employees!
author: Chloe W.
Mike P.
pros: Easy to use report Quick correct punches Very good set up schedule Only issue there is no space to write SSN and employee exemptions
cons: No space to write SSN or employees exemption

description: I have had a good experience with PayClock. Customer service particularly has always been helpful.
author: Jake G.
pros: Simple to use for the every day functions
cons: Reporting can be a bit cumbersome and the reports look amateur at best.

review_title: The best softwave and very user friendly
author: linda M.
pros: the non touch feature was the one that stands out to be great
cons: the only thing I wish I was able to upload to the information to my payroll company.
